overlay_pattern.summary: This creator primarily uses picture-in-picture videos (pip_video) along with static images to enhance their storytelling across the reels. They strategically place these overlays in both the hook/open and middle sections of the videos, often complementing spoken words with visual context that emphasizes key points.
